languages.text: "Надеюсь... Мы найдем способ разрешить проблему с особенностями нашего пропитания. Мы заберем некоторый запас, эм, пайков, с Гордости Сантиэля. Но надолго его не хватит".

traits.locale_text: "Надеюсь... Мы найдем способ разрешить проблему с особенностями нашего пропитания. Мы заберем некоторый запас, эм, пайков, с Гордости Сантиэля. Но надолго его не хватит".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Надеюсь... Мы найдем способ разрешить проблему с особенностями нашего пропитания. Мы заберем некоторый запас, эм, пайков, с Гордости Сантиэля. Но надолго его не хватит".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."
languages.original_text: "Надеюсь... Мы найдем способ разрешить проблему с особенностями нашего пропитания. Мы заберем некоторый запас, эм, пайков, с Гордости Сантиэля. Но надолго его не хватит".

traits.locale_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Ich hoffe... Wir werden es schaffen, das Problem unserer besonderen Ernährungsbedürfnisse zu lösen. Wir werden einige, ähm, Rationen von Santiels Stolz mitnehmen, aber es wird nicht lange reichen."
languages.original_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."

languages.text: "J'espère... Nous parviendrons à résoudre le problème de notre régime alimentaire particulier. Nous prendrons quelques rations de la fierté de Santiel, mais cela ne durera pas longtemps."
languages.original_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."

languages.text: "我希望我们将设法解决我们特殊的饮食需求问题。我们会从桑提尔之傲那里拿一些，嗯，口粮，但维持不了多久。"
languages.original_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."

languages.text: "Espero que... Nos las arreglaremos para resolver la cuestión de nuestro peculiar requisito dietético. Tomaremos algunas, ejem, raciones del Orgullo de Santiel, pero no durarán mucho".
languages.original_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."

languages.text: 「願わくば...私たち特有の食事条件については、なんとか解決できそうだ。サンティールの "プライド "から食料を調達するつもりだが、長くは持たないだろう」。
languages.original_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."

languages.text: "Umarım... Kendimize özgü beslenme ihtiyacımız konusunu çözmeyi başaracağız. Santiel'in Gururu'ndan biraz erzak alacağız ama bu çok uzun sürmeyecek."
languages.original_text: "I hope... We will manage to solve the issue of our peculiar dietary requirement. We will take some, ahem, rations from Santiel's Pride, but it will not last long."
